summary: GWAS Catalog links rs971891-T with Itch intensity from mosquito bite adjusted by bite size.
detail: GWAS Catalog association with p=3e-8. Effect: OR/Beta=0.0209049 [0.013-0.028] unit increase. Initial sample: 69,057 European ancestry individuals without immune related conditions.
whyItMatters: This common-variant association is matched locally against the uploaded genotype and should be treated as a tendency signal, not a prediction.
conditions: Itch intensity from mosquito bite adjusted by bite size
notes: Study: Jones AV, Hum Mol Genet, 2017-04-01.
Generated from bulk GWAS Catalog data; effect size and ancestry transferability require review.
